title: Ampere-oriented CE benchmark matrix and tuning policy
summary: Validated that CE tuning should stay device-agnostic and exposed reproducible benchmark/test entrypoints for CE work.
success_gate: Only introduce architecture-specific policy if the measured matrix shows device-agnostic autotune is insufficient.

results.note: Measured CE behavior on the local Ampere GPU did not justify architecture-specific buckets. The benchmark and parity test harnesses are now in place for future CE work.
